characters.name: Abby Whelan
characters.description: Okay... ground rule! Anytime I'm on the CD's, you hear something "R"-rated, you stop listening, and you bring it to me. Understood? — Nobody Likes Babies Abby WhelanBiographical informationStatusAliveOccupationSenior Associate atQuinn Perkins & AssociatesWhite House Chief of Staff(formerly)White House Press Secretary(formerly)RelationshipsLeo Bergen(ex boyfriend)David Rosen†(ex boyfriend)Charles Putney(ex husband)Behind the scenesFirst appearance"Sweet Baby"Last appearance"Over A Cliff"Episode count124ActorDarby Stanchfield Abby is very opinionated, whether it is about her colleagues or their clients, she tends to speak up about it. Her personality comes in handy with her job. She uses her investigating skills along with her sass to get into crimes scenes where she's not welcome.

characters.name: Baby Robin
characters.description: RobinBiographical informationStatusAliveFamilyQuinn Perkins(mother)Charlie(father)Olivia Pope(godmother)Behind the scenesFirst appearance"Robin"Last appearance"Over A Cliff"Episode count4ActorMarley & Mila Violet Black Robinis the daughter ofQuinn PerkinsandCharlie. Robin is the baby girl ofQuinn PerkinsandCharlie. Quinn Perkins was kidnapped byRowanwhile in the last month of her pregnancy. Rowan took her and locked her inside of his house basement in order to makeOliviatrade his own freedom, for her pregnant friends life. But Olivia ended up not caring for what happened to her friend and Rowan pretend he killed Quinn, but instead he decided to protect Quinn and unborn Robin from his own daughter.

characters.name: Bill Meyer
characters.description: Bill MeyerBiographical informationStatusDeceasedOccupationContractorRelationshipsJoan Reston(lover)Behind the scenesFirst appearance"All Roads Lead to Fitz"Last appearance"All Roads Lead to Fitz"Episode count1ActorUnknown Bill Meyerwas a general contractor who has a habit of having sexual relationships with the wives in the homes he builds. His last project was the house ofGovernor Samuel Reston, before he was shot dead after Samuel caught him "raping" his wife,Joan Reston. However he was in fact not raping the governors wife; they were in fact lovers. In order to save her marriage Joan cried "rape" when her husband came home early.

characters.name: Brandon Parker
characters.description: Brandon Parkerwas the son ofClarence Parker. Found dead in the night shot by a white cop. The cop claimed to have shoot him when Brandon had pulled a knife on him. It was later discovered byQuinn Perkins & & Associates (Formerly Olivia Pope & Associates)and Attorney GeneralDavid Rosenthat on that same night it was revealed that he picked up another perp an hour before the murder. This perp had a knife on him. The cop planted the knife at the scene to make himself innocent to justify the reasons for shooting Brandon. Olivia uncovers this and confronts the cop. We have not seen any footage with this boy alive.

characters.name: Carolina Florez
characters.description: Carolina FlorezBiographical informationStatusAliveRelationshipsBenicio Florez(husband)Behind the scenesFirst appearance"Enemy of the State"Last appearance"Enemy of the State"Episode count1ActorValerie Cruz Carolina FlorezisGeneral Benicio Florez's wife. She faked a kidnapping with her and two of her children to get away from her abusive husband. WhenAbby Whelanfinds her, she discovers that Carolina had run away with the children while in the U.S., the perfect place to get away. Abby checks her and the children into a hotel to hide them from General Florez; but Olivia finds out and has them brought to the office (Olivia Pope & Associates). When Abby comes in the next morning she is shocked to see them there.
